underlying_goal: Diagnose and fix Railway deployment errors (Celery worker async event loop mismatch), then deploy the fix
friction_detail: First fix had a bug where AsyncEngine.dispose() wasn't awaited in sync context, requiring a second deployment.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to diagnose Railway error logs; Claude identified a Celery fork/asyncpg event loop mismatch, fixed it, deployed, and verified zero errors.
